body_txt: A character dreams themself being perfect in every way, to the point that it resembles a Mary Sue Self-Insert fanfic. Often if this fantasy becomes known to others, it's a source of acute embarrassment to the dreamer. Usually a Fantasy Sequence , sometimes a Dream Sequence . A Sister Trope to Her Code Name Was "Mary Sue" (where it's written down for all to see). Contrast to Real Dreams are Weirder . See also Power Fantasy .
